{{TOCRWI}} '''Master Girl''' is a Chinese eSports organization formed by a famous caster and former StarCraft II player, '''Miss'''. == History == ==Timeline== {{TDRight |name1=2015 |content1= * March 27, '''Master Girl''' is formed with '''[[Ice-cream]]''', '''[[ZiZiJiang]]''', '''[[Miss (Han Yi-Ying)|Miss]]''', '''[[BeiZhu]]''', '''[[ChuQingSang]]''' and '''[[Bear (Xiong Ru-ting)|Bear]]'''.[http://t.qq.com/p/t/446990055860838 Miss' Weibo Status] ''t.qq.com'' }} ==Player Roster== ===Former=== {{listplayer/Start|newteam=yes|res=yes|dates=yes}} {{listplayer|Ice-cream|cn|Li Min (李敏)|Top|res=cn|newteam=none|joined=2015-03-27}} {{listplayer|ZiZiJiang|cn|Zhou Yue (周粤)|Jungle|res=cn|newteam=none|joined=2015-03-27}} {{listplayer|link=Miss (Han Yi-Ying)|Miss|cn|Han Yi-Ying (韩懿莹)|Mid|res=cn|newteam=Caster|joined=2015-03-27}} {{listplayer|BeiZhu|cn|Zhou Jia-Yu (周佳钰)|AD|res=cn|newteam=none|joined=2015-03-27}} {{listplayer|ChuQingSang|cn|Chen Hai-Chan (陈海禅)|Support|res=cn|newteam=none|joined=2015-03-27}} {{listplayer|link=Bear (Xiong Ru-Ting)|Bear|cn|Xiong Ru-Ting (熊茹婷)|Sub|res=cn|newteam=none|joined=2015-03-27}} {{Listplayer/End}} == Organization == ===Former=== {|class="sortable wikitable" ! !ID !Name !Position {{listplayer|link=Miss (Han Yi-Ying)|Miss|cn|Han Yi-Ying (韩懿莹)|'''Owner'''}} {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} == Highlight Videos == ==Interviews== ==Articles== ===2014=== ==References==
